message:
fix(mux): implement Linux VA-API H.264 video encoding

- Add video_encoder_linux.zig with VA-API hardware encoding
- Use H264Main profile for better driver compatibility
- Use vaCreateImage + vaPutImage for pixel upload (more reliable)
- Upload to src_surface and encode from it
- Generate matching SPS/PPS NAL units for Main profile
- Rebuild libghostty.a with EGL headless pixel reading fixes
